overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking through a dark urban night market beneath an overpass, interacting with a vendor stall, and continuing through a mechanical parking garage. The scene features neon lighting, wet concrete surfaces, and industrial architecture.

metal scaffolding with green netting on the right side
wall with white graffiti text reading ART THE BREACH

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dark, empty parking area beneath a concrete overpass toward an illuminated building facade. Scaffolding with green netting is visible on the right, and graffiti covers the left wall.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrow covered market walkway beneath the overpass. Vendor stalls line the right side with a green neon sign visible in the distance, while concrete support pillars pass by on the left.

events.description: slows and stops at vendor stall to examine items on display
character interacts with vendor merchandise, picking up and examining an item

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a vendor stall illuminated by fluorescent tubes and a green neon sign. The vendor stands behind a counter filled with cardboard boxes of merchandise as the character examines an item.

scene_state.functional_zone: mechanical parking garage with vertical car storage

events.description: turns away from vendor and resumes walking through parking area

cars parked on mechanical lifts in the stacking system
large concrete support pillars in the parking garage

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the vendor and walks through a parking garage featuring a multi-level mechanical car stacking system. Two distant pedestrians walk toward the camera as the scene progresses deeper into the concrete structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban underpass into a vibrant neon market and finally into a mechanical parking structure. It begins by following a character through a dark, empty parking area beneath a concrete overpass, passing graffiti-covered walls and green scaffolding. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts into a narrow covered walkway where concrete pillars give way to a row of vendor stalls illuminated by a distant green neon sign. The movement pauses as the character interacts with a vendor behind a counter of cardboard boxes under bright fluorescent tubes, before turning away to venture deeper into the concrete environment. The shot finally expands into a parking garage featuring a multi-level mechanical car stacking system as two distant pedestrians approach from the depths of the structure.
